[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 1000000 1
4 0100000 1
5 0000000 a
6 0000101 2
7 1000000 1

01 10 1100000 2
12 21 0100000 1 match 4
23 32 0100000 1 match 4
34 43 0000100 1
45 54 0000000 a match 0 1 2 5
56 65 0000000 a match 0 1 2 5
67 76 1000100 2
70 07 1000001 2

35 53 0100000 1 match 4

60 06 1000000 1 match 3 7
71 17 1000100 2

50 05 0100000 1 match 4
61 16 1000100 2
72 27 0000000 a match 0 1 2 5

04 40 1000000 1 match 3 7

26 62 0000000 a match 0 1 2 5
37 73 0000101 2 match 6
